programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Holly, Ben, Nanny and the King have to look after naughty twins Daisy and Poppy for the day. (VS)
Pockets has drawn a plan of a perfect Christmas Tree so the Mixmups mix up a Christmas Tree Adventure to try and find one.
Help the PAW Patrol solve games, puzzles, and brainteasers in these mini-missions. (Ep4)
Madame Gazelle and the playgroup are sharing their favourite nursery thymes, from singing Little Bo Peep to marching along with The Grand Old Duke of York.
Peppa's family are at Digger World, where they fun building walls and knocking them over again, and even help Mr Bull when there's an obstacle in the road.
King and Queen Thistle ask Nanny Plum and the Wise Old Elf to build a boat capable of beating the Marigolds.
Percy announces he is giving up his Ghost Scaring Machine, as he is too old for it now. However, it soon becomes clear that the machine is good for more than just scaring ghosts.
When Trevor is injured during first aid training with the Pioneers, know-it-all James panics, runs off and before long, needs rescuing himself!
Tim, Tommy, and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's Moon Parrot.
Peppa and George learn about verbal manners from Granny and Grandpa. Madame Gazelle also teaches the children about how wonderful it is to say please and thank you.
Peppa and George help an ice cream man make a new batch of ice cream.
Posy promises to play roly polys with Pip but forgets she's also meant to be playing in the sandpit with Frankie! She tries to play with both but wears herself.
The Woohoos see mysterious lights at dusk. They discover that the lights come from little beetles called glow worms, who emit light from their bottoms so they can find each other.
Paddington throws a birthday party for Mateo, but things don't go to plan, so Mrs Brown tries to save the day with her clown act.
...Movie Monster. A monster movie is being filmed in Adventure Bay and Mayor Humdinger is jealous.
At Askham Bryan Wildlife Park the Cadets build a tiny cosy house for some super-cute harvest mice, and get creative making smelly toys to keep the Scottish wildcats entertained.
When the Mice Squad's van is on the receiving end of a big chomp, all signs point to an alligator as the culprit. Or was it a crocodile?
Patrick's evil twin cousin shows up to ruin Patrick's reputation.

programmes.show_name: Bargain Loving Brits in the Sun Cutdowns
programmes.show_description: Furniture shop owner Haley sets out to meet her delivery van to prep for a fitting. But she can't find the delivery van or the house where they're supposed to meet. (Ep1)

programmes.show_name: Hotel Benidorm: Fun Loving Brits in the Sun
programmes.show_description: In keeping with Costa Blanca's name, there's a white-themed party. New receptionist Ruben flies solo for the first time, but experiences an unhappy customer.
In the first episode of the series, the staff at the Rio Park Hotel are ready to welcome thousands of Brits back to this Benidorm favourite.

programmes.show_name: M&S vs Aldi: Who Does Easter Best?
programmes.show_description: From luxury truffle-filled Easter eggs to the tastiest hot cross buns, and from chocolate Cavapoos to shoulders of lamb, we compare Aldi with Marks & Spencer's Easter fodder in a taste off.

programmes.show_name: Cadbury at Easter: Secrets of the Chocolate Factory
programmes.show_description: Dive into the enticing world of Easter chocolate, the famous confectioner's role in the origins of the Easter egg and the modern collaboration with Domino's Pizza.
The wealthy Olutayo family travel to Switzerland with the cash-strapped Gee family. How will self-catering in wooden cabins with shared loos compare to a 5-star Alpine hotel and spa?
In an episode of tears and triumphs, highlighting the striking difference in how we live, angel investor Steve Bolton swaps with carer Val who dreams of starting her own restaurant.

programmes.show_name: When Theme Parks Go Horribly Wrong
programmes.show_description: Tales of theme park days out that turned disastrous, from the fire-breathing dragon that became an inferno to some foreign roller coasters where safety doesn't seem to matter.

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Nanny Plum takes the fairy children for a lesson in the woods. But with no frogs at the pond to show them, Nanny decides to magic herself into one. (VS)
Peppa tries to learn how to whistle after she realises that seemingly everyone but her can do it.
Doctor Hamster's Tortoise: Doctor Hamster the vet comes to Peppa's playgroup to show the children her pets.
Tweedy learns that Fluffs do not like the wind! (Ep24)
Squiggle receives a mysterious call to play secret messages. At Dotty's house they all play secret messages. Upon Squiggle's return to the treehouse, even Fluff has a go at playing. (Ep11)
...Big Adventures! When a pretend emergency turns into a real emergency, there is only one engine who can save the day.
It's time for the Big Pontypandy Talent Show! But when Elvis knocks a drink over the drone control panel, the drones crash land, causing many fires.
Peppa and her family are looking forward to a trip to the seaside, but when they arrive at the beach there is too much snow!
Paddington decides to dig for buried treasure with his trusty magic probe metal detector.
Pip and Posy make Zac a mermaid's tail made out of sand, adding pebble and leaf decorations. When Posy's leaves go missing, she accuses Pip of taking them.
When a magic trick goes awry, the Adventure Bay Easter Festival is overrun by wild bunnies.
The pups' soccer practice turns into a construction project and a brand-new sport when a family of bunnies hops onto the field.
Peppa and George wake up in Granny and Grandpa's tent by the sea. Peppa finds a message in a bottle with a telephone number on it. Who is it from?
Peppa is so excited to meet her new baby brother or sister, but they are taking forever to arrive until suddenly Mummy Pig announces the baby is coming, now!
The Rex family go on a long road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World.
...Bike Race. Adventure Bay is having a big bike race! With so many bikes on the road, it's going to be tough to keep everyone safe. But Chase and his team are on the case!
When Milo, Lofty and Lark help Doc Diamond look after some poorly animals on Farmer Tilly's farm, they struggle to work out what's wrong with them.
Snooty King and Queen Marigold invite themselves round for dinner at the castle to sample Nanny Plum's cooking.
When Peppa's family car breaks down, Miss Rabbit lends them her plane and they find themselves swept off on an adventure all around the world.
Every bird has their own song-except Doodle doesn't know what a 'Doodle Song' is supposed to sound like. Odo tries everything he can think of to help Doodle.

programmes.show_name: New: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programmes.show_description: A call about a robbery and assault leads to a hunt on Humberside police's patch with dog and drone units. And in Scunthorpe there's a catastrophic road collision.
Victoria Hamilton stars as Helen, a teacher who dismisses the woke ideologies of the younger generation but finds herself drawn into a situation that threatens to endanger her family.
Shop staff report three men stealing a piece of garden furniture, but one man will not give in easily. And officers respond to a call about a man threatening a female with a hammer.
More than 60 thefts are reported to Derbyshire Police every day. In this episode, following a rise in thefts across the East Midlands, officers target organised gangs of thieves.
